title: Statistical Investigation of miRNA Alteration in Hyperthyroidism Patients
author: ALBORISHA, Omer Thamer Marzoog
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Recently, there has been a great deal of interest in microRNAs, often referred to as miRNAs. MicroRNAs are non-protein-coding RNA molecules that are found in certain organs and are responsible for controlling gene expression in eukaryotic animals (Bavelloni et al. 2017).
